claimText: The Quad launched the Critical Minerals Initiative.
evidenceExcerpt: The Quad (US, Japan, India, Australia) launched the Critical Minerals Initiative.
distractorHooks: Attributing the initiative to BRICS or G20

claimText: The Ministry of Mines released a list of 30 critical minerals for India.
evidenceExcerpt: The Ministry of Mines released a list of 30 critical minerals including Lithium, Cobalt, Nickel, and REEs.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's critical minerals policy.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Earth Sciences or Ministry of Coal releasing the list

claimText: India joined the US-led Minerals Security Partnership (MSP) in 2023.
evidenceExcerpt: India joined the US-led Minerals Security Partnership (MSP) in 2023 to secure critical mineral supply chains.
distractorHooks: MSP is led by the UN or EU
India is not a member of MSP

claimText: Khanij Bidesh India Limited (KABIL) is a joint venture under the Ministry of Mines to acquire critical minerals globally.
evidenceExcerpt: Khanij Bidesh India Limited (KABIL) is a joint venture by the Ministry of Mines to acquire critical minerals globally.

claimText: India's first Nickel-Copper-Platinum Group Element (Ni-Cu-PGE) sulphide discovery was made in the Mahasamund district of Chhattisgarh.
evidenceExcerpt: India's first Ni-Cu-PGE sulphide discovery occurred in the Mahasamund district of Chhattisgarh
examUse: Correct-pair question matching mineral discovery to the state.
distractorHooks: Discovery of a different mineral group
